title: Kizaru Lands on Egghead
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Bonney, Kizaru, Unknown person #5, Saturn, Unknown person #6 as The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.
scene: The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Meanwhile, on the fabric-stratum down below

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Stay away from the city center!

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: Jewelry Bonney must be close by!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Be on your guard! She could be hiding anywhere!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: If you're careless, she'll age warp you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: sonna-!! where did that whisper snapper run off to.?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He's been burned to a crisp....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Get out of here, the Marines are coming.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What should I do...? Can I hide until the heat dies down?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Aaah HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ohh, zoro!! You guys are really going at it down there!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Siege Begins through 30 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
